task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a recurring holiday definition for 'New Year's Day' (Fixed, January 1).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a recurring holiday named 'New Year's Day' with Type 'Fixed', Month 'January', Day '1' in the TimeTrex Recurring Holidays interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a recurring holiday definition for 'MLK Day' (Fixed, January 19).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a recurring holiday named 'MLK Day' with Type 'Fixed', Month 'January', Day '19' in the TimeTrex Recurring Holidays interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a recurring holiday definition for 'Presidents' Day' (Fixed, February 16).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a recurring holiday named 'Presidents' Day' with Type 'Fixed', Month 'February', Day '16' in the TimeTrex Recurring Holidays interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Holiday Policy named 'Standard Q1 Holidays' with Type: Standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a Holiday Policy named 'Standard Q1 Holidays' with Type 'Standard' in the TimeTrex Holiday Policies list or creation form.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Standard Q1 Holidays' policy configuration showing 'New Year's Day', 'MLK Day', and 'Presidents' Day' linked or assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a pay code named 'Shift Differential' with Type: Paid.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a pay code named 'Holiday Premium' with Type: Paid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a pay code named 'Holiday Premium' in the TimeTrex Pay Codes list or saved creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a station with Source IP 10.0.75.10 and Description 'Warehouse Entry Kiosk'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a station record with source '10.0.75.10', description 'Warehouse Entry Kiosk', and Type 'PC' in the TimeTrex Stations list or saved form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TimeTrex web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TimeTrex web application running in a browser, with visible navigation through menus and forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, SQL clients, or script executions used to bypass the TimeTrex web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the forms for holidays, policies, pay codes, and stations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screenshots showing the agent typing names, selecting dropdowns, and clicking save buttons across multiple different TimeTrex admin pages.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated between at least 3 different TimeTrex admin sections.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent visiting the Recurring Holidays page, Holiday Policies page, Pay Codes page, and Stations page during the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must complete 4 distinct steps across different TimeTrex modules: (1) Create 3 recurring holiday definitions under Policy > Recurring Holidays: New Year's Day Fixed Jan 1, MLK Day Fixed Jan 19, Presidents' Day Fixed Feb 16. (2) Create a Holiday Policy named 'Standard Q1 Holidays' (Type: Standard) under Policy > Holiday Policies, and link all 3 recurring holidays to it. (3) Create 2 pay codes under Policy > Pay Codes: 'Shift Differential' (Paid) and 'Holiday Premium' (Paid). (4) Create a station under Company > Stations with Description 'Warehouse Entry Kiosk', Type PC, Source 10.0.75.10, Station ID ANY.
